tool.name: obiannotate
tool.command:
obiannotate --no-progressbar
#for i in $repeat_obigrep @OPTIONS_OBIGREP@ #end for
#if $rename_tag.old_name and $rename_tag.new_name --rename-tag '$rename_tag.old_name'='$rename_tag.new_name' #end if
#if $deletetag_key --delete-tag='$deletetag_key' #end if
#if $set_tag.key and $set_tag.expression --set-tag '$set_tag.key=$set_tag.expression' #end if
#if $setid_expression --set-identifier='$setid_expression' #end if
#if $setdefinition_expression --definition='$setdefinition_expression' #end if
#if str($cut) == "use_cut" --cut $cut_start:$cut_end #end if
#for i in $key_selector #if $i.key --keep='$i.key' #end if #end for
#if $aho_corasick --aho-corasick $aho_corasick #end if
#if $pattern_section.pattern --pattern $pattern_section.pattern #if $pattern_section.pattern_error and $pattern_section.pattern_name --pattern-error $pattern_section.pattern_error --pattern-name $pattern_section.pattern_name #else if $pattern_section.pattern_name --pattern-name $pattern_section.pattern_name #else --pattern-error $pattern_section.pattern_error #end if #end if
${length} ${clearbool}
#if $rankname --with-taxon-at-rank='$rankname' #end if $compress_bool @INPUT_FORMAT@ $input > '$output'
@GENERATE_GALAXY_JSON@

param.name: deletetag_key
param.label: Delete attribute
param.help: Use this option if you want to delete attribute named ATTRIBUTE_NAME.When this attribute is missing, the sequence record is skipped and the next one is examined

param.name: setid_expression
param.label: Set sequence record identifier with a value
param.help: Use this option if you want to set sequence record identifier with a value computed from expression

param.name: expression
param.label: Run a expression on each selected sequence
param.help: Use this option if you want to run a expression on each selected sequence

param.name: setsequence_expression
param.label: Change the sequence itself with a value
param.help: Use this option if you want to change the sequence itself with a value computed from expression

param.name: setdefinition_expression
param.label: Set sequence definition with a value computed
param.help: Use this option if you want to set sequence definition with a value computed from expression

param.name: clearbool
param.label: Clear all attributes associated to the sequence records
param.help: Use this option if you want to clear all attributes associated to the sequence records

param.name: length
param.label: Use the length option?
param.help: Use this option if you want to add attribute with seq_length as a key and sequence length as a value

param.name: rankname
param.label: Add taxonomic annotation
param.help: Use this option if you want to add taxonomic annotation at taxonomic rank RANK_NAME

param.name: aho_corasick
param.label: Adds an aho-corasick attribute with the count of matches of the provided patterns.

param.name: cut
param.label: Use this option to cut a specific part of the sequences

section.name: pattern_section
section.title: Several option to search for pattern in sequence

param.name: pattern
param.label: the primer sequence to be searched.

param.name: pattern_error
param.label: the maximum error allowed when matching the primer.

tool.help:
.. class:: infomark
**What it does**
`obiannotate` is the command that allows adding/modifying/removing annotation attributes attached to sequence records.
Once such attributes are added, they can be used by the other OBITools commands for filtering purposes or for statistics computing.
@OBITOOLS_LINK@
